stdout: PASS: CornerStone CLI native-first docs verified (39 feature-family rows; all CLI-required and release-blocking).
PASS: design tokens verified (11 state tokens, 8 color groups).
PASS: CornerStone design system docs verified.

stdout_tail: PASS: scenario verification matrix verified (206 scenarios; no missing rows; no unevidenced PASS claims).

stdout: PASS: CornerStone design system docs verified.
PASS: CornerStone VS-0 scaffold readiness docs verified.
PASS: CornerStone SoT docs verified (206 full scenarios, design system, VS-0 scaffold readiness, VS-0 scaffold gate, 58 VS-0 scenarios, CLI native-first gate, local verification plane).

human_required.expected_evidence: Acceptance note with screenshots/recording, or rejection note with issue list.
human_required.release_impact: Blocks product-alpha human UX acceptance claim; does not block local Slice 001/002 proof.
human_required.required_human_action: JiYong/Tars completes the local VS4 walkthrough and records accept or reject.

scenario_results.notes: Source artifact remains preserved with sha256 original storage ref and ready derived text.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if original is preserved before generated output; FAIL if generated summary hides missing original preservation.

scenario_results.notes: Evidence-backed Brief is created from a concrete Evidence Bundle.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Brief is a visible central product object; FAIL if user only sees raw search/proof output.

scenario_results.notes: Brief contains supported key points, evidence links, uncertainty, and next-step guidance.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if supported findings and gaps are visible; FAIL on unsupported AI answer presented as fact.

scenario_results.notes: Shared Evidence Drawer exposes source, snippet, provenance, and audit linkage.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if evidence is one clear action away and resolves to source/provenance; FAIL if evidence is only decorative label.

scenario_results.notes: Claim candidate remains evidence-backed and tied to the Evidence Bundle.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Claim candidate remains evidence-aware and scoped; FAIL if Claim loses evidence or trust state.

scenario_results.notes: Zero-evidence claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if zero-evidence approval creates no approved claim; FAIL if unsupported claim becomes authority.

scenario_results.notes: Memory/Wiki candidate is draft, inspectable, evidence-backed, and not owner-approved.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Memory candidate is visible and reviewable; FAIL if durable memory is hidden.

scenario_results.notes: Draft memory cannot influence answers or actions and is not hidden durable memory.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if pre-approval memory does not become approved truth; FAIL on silent memory write or hidden profiling.

scenario_results.notes: Action Card review includes goal, why/evidence, dry-run, policy, risk, approval, and local activity.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if user can understand action before approval; FAIL if action appears as magic automation.

scenario_results.notes: Action path uses mock ConnectorHub boundary with real_external_http_calls=0.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if no live writeback is claimed or performed; FAIL on hidden or implied live external send.

scenario_results.notes: Claim and Action references align to the runtime Brief detail design without using reference images as PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: Prompt-injection fixture is detected and creates no tool calls, actions, external calls, or authority expansion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if untrusted content cannot create authority; FAIL on content-driven approval/action/egress.

scenario_results.notes: Reference images remain design guidance only; PASS evidence is runtime/docs/CLI output.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if image references are not used as PASS proof; FAIL if image existence marks a scenario passing.

scenario_results.notes: Brief detail feature paths have native CLI transcripts with JSON output and expected negative exit code.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if missing CLI parity blocks feature PASS; FAIL if UI/API-only feature is accepted.
